channel.title: Data on Aneesh Mokashi
channel.description: Recent content in Data on Aneesh Mokashi

item.title: Jitsi Topic Segmentation and Recap MLOps System
item.author: aneeshkmokashi@gmail.com (Aneesh Mokashi)
item.description: Data orchestration, feedback capture, and monitoring pipeline for meeting transcript segmentation and recap generation

item.title: Real-Time Data Visualization Dashboard
item.author: aneeshkmokashi@gmail.com (Aneesh Mokashi)
item.description: Spring Boot dashboard with REST APIs and WebSocket/STOMP streaming for live application metrics

item.title: Optimizing Transformer-Based Time Series Forecasting
item.author: aneeshkmokashi@gmail.com (Aneesh Mokashi)
item.description: PyTorch optimization work incorporating FlashAttention into Temporal Fusion Transformer training

item.title: IMDB Movie Recommendation System
item.author: aneeshkmokashi@gmail.com (Aneesh Mokashi)
item.description: Hybrid recommender combining collaborative filtering with TF-IDF content similarity for personalized movie suggestions
